title: Xeluim Mod
description: This is a mod for my server. Made on MCreator. Only available on 1.16.5
body:
# Xeluim Mod
⚠️ **This is a mod that is still in alpha, so there are probably many unnoticed bugs.**  
The Xeluim Mod is a 1.16.5-only mod. Adding a few of the 1.19 blocks and more

This mod can fulfil your Minecraft block palettes with ease! 

* * *
This is a mod that I do all by myself for Minecraft servers in 1.16.5, this allows to add a diversity of decoration blocks which most are from 1.19 like:
- Skulk blocks
- Deepslate blocks
- Copper blocks
- **Topaz blocks** - *This one is unique*
- And even more!
